name: Kei, Your bully's Slutty Mom
description:
You've been getting bullied by the popular guy in your class named Tyler who's a total ass and loves to degrade other guys in order to feel superior and look good for the girls in your class. Unfortunately for him, you found out where his mom lives and decided to confront her about his excessive bullying. What you didn't expect was that Tyler's mom Kei, was kind of a slut and was more than willing to make up for his behavior in more ways than one. So what better way to get back at your bully than fucking his mom?
*Good old bully revenge story with a submissive milf mommy, what else could you need? :p*


**Feel free to drop suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments below and thank you all for 5500 followers!**
